expressions.name: Placeholder
description: An expression to obtain the placeholder (or part of it) in a placeholder request event.

expressions.name: Placeholder Result
description: The value of a placeholder in a placeholder event. Can be set, reset, or deleted.
examples: if the identifier is "author": # Placeholder is "%skriptplaceholders_author%"

expressions.name: Placeholder Value
description: An expression to obtain the value of a placeholder from a supported plugin.
examples: set {_ping} to the placeholder "player_ping" from arg-1 # PlaceholderAPI
set {_ping} to the placeholder "{ping}" from arg-1 # MVdWPlaceholderAPI
set {_status} to the relational placeholder "rel_friendship_status" from arg-1 and arg-2

expressions.name: Relational Placeholder Players
description: The two players involved in a relational placeholder request.
examples: placeholderapi relational placeholder with the prefix "skriptplaceholders":
if the identifier is "longer_name": # Placeholder is "%rel_skriptplaceholders_longer_name%"
if the length of the name of the first player > the length of the name of the second player:
set the result to the name of the first player
set the result to the name of the second player

structures.name: Custom Placeholder
description: A structure for creating custom placeholders.
The code will be executed every time the placeholder plugin requests a value for the placeholder.
examples: if the identifier is "author": # Placeholder is "%skriptplaceholders_author%"
placeholderapi relational placeholder with the prefix "skriptplaceholders":
if the identifier is "longer_name": # Placeholder is "%rel_skriptplaceholders_longer_name%"
if the length of the name of the first player > the length of the name of the second player:
set the result to the name of the first player
set the result to the name of the second player
